title: Round Cable Clips 7mm Black - Pack of 100
features: Package Include: Pack of 100 7mm circle cable clip with steel nail. Suitable for cables with a diameter of 7mm or less

Quality Material: Made of high quality PE stabilized plastic and galvanized steel nails. With good insulation, corrosion resistance, aging resistance and strong load capacity. Can be used indoors and outdoors
Easy installation: Just use a hammer to nail the cable to the wall and you will get a cleaner look. Also, people can prevent tripping over loose cables

Wide use: Provide secure fixation for RG8X, RG58, RG59 or LMR 240 coax cable, RG6 digital video or audio coaxial cable, Ethernet Cat 5, Cat 6 network cable, 12 to 16 AWG speaker wire, phone wire, USB cable, etc
Application: The wire nail clips are designed to keep loose wires secure, simply insert the cable into the clip slot, then hammer the nail into wood, plaster, or brick surfaces
